title: INTERNAL_TOOL_CALL_OBSERVABILITY_PLAN

lane_3_mcp_lazy_init_boundary.disable_mechanism: No enabled servers in extensions_config.json OR include_mcp=False in get_available_tools()
lane_3_mcp_lazy_init_boundary.avoidance_mechanism: create_deerflow_agent(tools=[echo_tool]) [factory.py:61] bypasses get_available_tools() entirely — user-injected tools take priority and no MCP path is reached
lane_3_mcp_lazy_init_boundary.mcp_start_condition: get_available_tools() called with include_mcp=True AND ExtensionsConfig has enabled servers
lane_3_mcp_lazy_init_boundary.key_finding: Two distinct tool paths: (1) make_lead_agent → get_available_tools (MCP-dependent), (2) create_deerflow_agent(tools=...) bypasses get_available_tools

lane_5_tool_event_surface.tool_call_in_values_snapshot: AIMessage.tool_calls present in channel_values['messages'] after tool invocation node
lane_5_tool_event_surface.sse_event_type: 'messages' — _lg_mode_to_sse_event maps LangGraph 'messages' mode to SSE 'messages' event
lane_5_tool_event_surface.runstore_persistence: journal.get_completion_data() captures token_usage; update_run_completion(result=serialize_channel_values) in finally block [worker.py:341-344]

lane_6_patch_harness_strategy.option_a_description: Inject a simple built-in echo tool via create_deerflow_agent(tools=[echo_tool]) — no MCP server connections, no get_available_tools() call
lane_6_patch_harness_strategy.option_a_pro: No MCP initialization, no config changes, uses the correct agent factory that accepts tools directly
lane_6_patch_harness_strategy.option_a_con: make_lead_agent does not accept tools parameter — cannot be used for this smoke test
lane_6_patch_harness_strategy.option_b_con: Requires config file manipulation, may not fully suppress MCP lazy init in all paths

unknown_registry.description: get_available_tools() [tools.py:113] calls get_cached_mcp_tools() which triggers MCP lazy init if any servers are enabled
unknown_registry.mitigation: Use create_deerflow_agent(tools=[echo_tool]) to avoid get_available_tools entirely

unknown_registry.description: make_lead_agent() [agent.py:317] has no tools= parameter — tools come only from internal get_available_tools() call
unknown_registry.mitigation: For internal smoke tests, use create_deerflow_agent(tools=[...]) from factory.py instead

unknown_registry.description: R139 logged tools_bound_count=0 because no ToolConfig entries exist in the harness-configured minimal AppConfig (only MiniMax model, no tool configs)

key_insight: create_deerflow_agent(tools=[echo_tool]) [factory.py:61] is the correct path for internal smoke testing — it accepts tools directly, deduplicates against feature-injected tools, and never reaches get_available_tools() when tools are injected
